case_title: JESUS ARIAS VS. OK SUN KIM, DBA WON MI RESTAURANT, DBA WON MEE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIAS, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT OK SUN KIM, DBA WON MI RESTAURANT, DBA WON MEE B.B.Q.
